gaps: Shipping experience in fintech, payments, or a similarly regulated environment
Strong operational discipline: processes, metrics, delivery predictability
Fluent English (written and spoken); Russian is a welcome bonus but not required
Experience passing SOC 2, PCI DSS, or similar audits
Experience with mobile-first products built on React Native
Experience with distributed / remote teams across different time zones
Ownership mindset: you take a problem and drive it to completion rather than handing it off

proof_points.requirement: Experience leading teams of 5–15 engineers in a product company
proof_points.evidence: Founded Moonshot team (1 → 10 engineers): hiring, sprint cadence, product vision, stakeholder reporting

proof_points.requirement: Communication: able to explain technical decisions to non-technical stakeholders (investors, legal, compliance)
proof_points.evidence: First company admitted to Securities Commission Malaysia regulatory sandbox

proof_points.requirement: Low ego: comfortable operating within an already-established architecture rather than rewriting it to match your preferences
proof_points.evidence: Designed and built internal cryptographic framework underpinning passkey wallet architecture

proof_points.requirement: + years in engineering, including 3+ years in a management role (Engineering Manager / Head of Engineering / VP)
proof_points.evidence: Decentralised key management via DNS TXT records. Adopted by ATA Plus ECF, cited in SC Malaysia capital markets blueprint, reused in Oviato 9 years later

proof_points.requirement: Readiness to operate in an early-stage startup: hands-on, no corporate comfort, multiple context switches per day
proof_points.evidence: Accepted into 500 Startups Batch 9 and Antler Malaysia Batch 2
